name: Delaware DPR Board of Electrical Examiners License Lookup
updateFrequency: unknown; verify current credential status through DELPROS before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Delaware apprentice, residential, journeyperson, master, master special, limited, and limited special electrician licenses
knownExclusions: This entry covers electrical credentials only; contractor registration, plumbing/HVACR, asbestos, local permits, and business licenses are separate sources.
The shared DELPROS lookup covers many professions and credential levels; electrical contractor and individual records must not be conflated.
Solar coverage is limited to electrical work that falls within Delaware electrical licensure and inspection-agency requirements.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Use the official DELPROS lookup manually and do not automate portal traffic unless access controls and terms are reviewed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official credential lookup metadata only. Absence from one credential type is not proof that no other Delaware authorization exists.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: DPR offers online verification and roster requests, but no stable public bulk file or API contract has been reviewed for this board.
researchNotes: The Board of Electrical Examiners issues electrical credentials through DPR and DELPROS. This source remains a manual handoff until a stable, permitted machine interface is reviewed.
verificationCaveats: Preserve the credential type and individual/facility distinction from DELPROS.
No match means no matching electrical credential record was found in this source at the checked time, not that no authorization exists elsewhere.
verificationNotes: No supported adapter is exposed while the shared DELPROS portal lacks a reviewed stable machine-readable contract.
maintainerNotes: Keep electrical credential records separate from Delaware contractor-registration, plumbing/HVACR, asbestos, and municipal permit records.

researchEvidence.note: Official board page states that the Board issues apprentice, journeyperson, master, master special, limited, and limited special electrician licenses and licenses electrical inspection agencies.
Official DELPROS license lookup is the public verification path for Delaware professional licenses.
Delaware.gov privacy and terms material reviewed; redistribution rights for normalized registry datasets remain unconfirmed.

blocker.summary: The shared DELPROS verification portal has no reviewed stable public machine-readable contract for electrical credentials.
